seoTitle: Petina vs Pewsey Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Petina and Pewsey Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Petina vs Pewsey Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Petina and Pewsey Vale.
heading: Petina vs Pewsey Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Petina, South Australia and Pewsey Vale, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pewsey Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Petina (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Petina or Pewsey Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Petina has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Pewsey Vale scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Petina scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Pewsey Vale scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Petina or Pewsey Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pewsey Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
